questionHtml: Outline the impact of alien species on endemic species in ecosystems.
markschemeHtml:
a. ‹interspecific› competition with endemic/native species ✔ May be outlined using a specific example

b. may cause the extinction/reduction of endemic/native species
OR
reduces biodiversity
OR
becomes invasive ✔

c. does not have endemic / natural predators so may increase in numbers ✔

d. upsets the balance between predators and prey
OR
disrupts food chains ✔

meta.title: Outline the impact of alien species on endemic species in ecosystems.
breadcrumbLabels: A4.2.6. Causes of the current biodiversity crisis
